rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF BARBARA A. LEE
rulings.Calendar Matter: REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 05/29/2024, as the following issues (e-mailed to counsel on 02/27/2024 - see also tentative ruling for 03/26/2024 hearing) remain unaddressed: 1) No proposed order has been received or lodged. 2) No DE-120 form is on file. A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) must be attached to and served with the form at least 15 days before the hearing. 3) The petition must be verified by the executor. 4) All the information required by LRSF 14.35(J)(1) must be provided. Allegations must be made as to notice pursuant to Probate Code section 9202 and any assignments or powers of attorney that may affect distribution. 5) The petition must be amended to request a specific period for which a continuance of administration is sought. 6) No final inventory and appraisal has been filed. 7) The decedent died more than 2 years ago, but no first interim account has been filed. Waivers of the first account signed by beneficiaries of the devisee trust have been filed, but the trustee must waive the account. The trustee's waiver must include language required by Probate Code section 10954(b)(4). Note: An appearance may be required on 05/29/2024 for the Court to consider whether to take this petition off calendar, unless papers showing satisfactory progress are on file.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SANDRA HEISTER
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 05/29/2024 (no earlier date available), as the following issues (e-mailed to counsel on 03/19/2024) remain unaddressed: 1) The declaration re financial account statements filed on 02/20/2024 must be signed by the petitioner "under penalty of perjury under the laws of the State of California". See CCP section 2015.5. 2) Paragraph 22: No filing fee ($435) was charged for the amended petition. 3) Summary of Account & Schedule 1: The total property on hand at beginning of account must match the amended inventory and appraisal value ($589,633.16). TD Ameritrade cash account balance is different. 4) Schedule 1: i) The number of shares of AWSHX must match those listed on the amended inventory and appraisal (1,174.773). ii) The account statement shows 1,200.755 shares of AWSHX as of 01/01/2023, but the amended inventory and appraisal shows 1,174.773 shares as of 12/11/2022. If 25.982 shares (= 1,200.755- 1,174.773) were purchased with reinvested dividends and/or capital gains between 12/11/2022 and 01/01/2023, such dividends and/or gains must appear as receipts on Schedule 2. The number of shares purchased with each reinvestment must be listed on a separate schedule required by Probate Code section 1063(b). 5) Schedule 4: Income dividends and capital gains (under the category of Capital World Growth and Income Fund) are not disbursements/credits, even if they were reinvested to purchase additional shares. 6) Schedule 5: Dividends and capital gains reinvested to purchase additional shares between 12/11/2022 and 09/30/2023 must be added to the ending carry values of CWGIX and AWSHX shares. 7) The estimated market value of each non-cash asset as of 09/30/2023 must be listed on a separate schedule required by section 1063(a).

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE DAN DEBARDELEBEN TRUST DATED MAY 7, 2013 AS DATED, AS AMENDED
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Confirming Trust Asset
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The petition prays for an order confirming the settlor's 20% interest in real property in Sonoma County. The settlor acquired his 20% interest as an unmarried man and tenants in common with the petitioner who acquired her 80% interest as trustee of her own trust. About 16 months later, the settlor signed a second Addendum to the Trust naming the petitioner as sole trustee and one of the beneficiaries. The settlor died without signing a deed to formally transfer his 20% interest in the Sonoma property to his trust. Since the last hearing, the settlor's siblings and only heirs (who would presumably succeed to the settlor's interest in the Sonoma property) have signed consents to the relief sought by the petition. The petitioner has also filed her own declaration stating that the settlor, during his life, made clear his intent that full ownership of the property should pass to the petitioner on the settlor's death. Probate Code section 15206 provides that a trust in relation to real property is not valid unless evidenced by one of the following methods: (a) By a written instrument signed by the trustee, or by the trustee's agent if authorized in writing to do so; (b) By a written instrument conveying the trust property signed by the settlor, or by the settlor's agent if authorized in writing to do so; or (c) By operation of law. See also Osswald v. Anderson (1996) 49 Cal.App.4th 812, 818 ("Although Ellis's testimony related the Osswalds' intent that their home was to be the trust property, the statute of frauds forbids the creation of an express trust in real property by verbal declaration of the owner.") The Court is to determine whether the evidence on file shows the settlor's intent to treat his interest in the Sonoma property as an asset of his trust and whether the evidence satisfies the statute of frauds required to transfer any real property interest to a trust. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.
